insight: Protect scans hoppers/barrels/shulkers via the same code path as chests; confiscation only fires when a player opens the container. If chests work but another container doesn't, ScanListener.onInventoryOpen skips it: containers whose size != type.getDefaultSize() and != 2x default are skipped as "custom size" (often a resized GUI from another plugin). Diagnose with Debug: [scan, operator]; the custom-title gate applies only to CHEST/ENDER_CHEST, not hoppers.
